name: BarsList
description: Display a list of bars with names and values
searchText: barslist display a list of bars with names and values @mantine/charts /charts/bars-list autocontrast barcolor bargap barheight bartextcolor barslabel data getbarprops minbarsize renderbar valueformatter valuelabel

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: If set, adjusts text color based on background color

props.name: barColor
props.description: Default bar background color, used when item does not have color specified

props.name: barsLabel
props.description: Label displayed above the bars column

props.name: getBarProps
props.description: Function to pass props down to the bar depending on the bar data payload

props.name: renderBar
props.description: Function to completely customize bar rendering

props.name: valueLabel
props.description: Label displayed above the values column
